definitions.text: Sour, sharp, or biting to the taste; tart; having the taste of vinegar.

examples: His response was harsh and acid.

definitions.text: Of or pertaining to an acid; acidic.

(chemistry) Any compound which yields H+ ions (protons) when dissolved in water; an Arrhenius acid. Any compound that easily donates protons to a base; a Brønsted acid. Any compound that can accept a pair of electrons to form a covalent bond; a Lewis acid.
Any compound which yields H+ ions (protons) when dissolved in water; an Arrhenius acid.
